topics.title: Hamptons Concert Experiences and Celebrity Encounters
topics.summary: The studio recounts a series of high-profile social gatherings in the Hamptons featuring performances by Tom Petty, Paul McCartney, and Bruce Springsteen.

topics.title: Ralph's Behavior at a Concert
topics.summary: The studio recounts an incident involving Ralph's public intoxication and inappropriate behavior during a concert trip to the Hamptons.

topics.title: Ralph's Disoriented Night Out
topics.summary: The studio recounts the chaotic events following a concert where Ralph became intoxicated and separated from the group, eventually leaving him to wander alone before he began sending panicked messages in the early morning.

topics.title: Ralph's Drunken Journey and Missing Money
topics.summary: The studio recounts a chaotic night involving Ralph's intoxicated behavior, his struggle to find a way home, and a dispute over $300 in cash that he allegedly kept after being helped by the group.

topics.title: Wedding Guest List and Media Rumors
topics.summary: The studio discusses the logistics of selecting wedding guests, rumors regarding Owen Wilson's health, and a false news report about Howard's dental care.

topics.title: Artie's Apology for Missing a Wedding
topics.summary: The show features Artie reading a self-deprecating and humorous apology letter to Isaac and Susan after he slept through their wedding due to a hangover.

topics.title: Host and Co-host Conflict Over Staff Loyalty
topics.summary: The studio features a heated exchange between the host and his co-host regarding internal tensions, personal grievances with staff members, and the perceived competence of their colleagues.

topics.title: Miss Teen USA Contest Clips
topics.summary: The studio reviews a viral clip of a pageant contestant giving an incoherent answer about geography and another contestant describing a sexual encounter as her greatest risk.

topics.title: Media Critique and Border Patrol Discussion
topics.summary: The studio explores media figures' roles in Iraq, a comedian's potential tour for troops, a listener's interaction with his mother, a viral television interview, and an interview with a border patrol agent regarding immigration enforcement.

topics.title: Senator Larry Craig Scandal and Bathroom Culture
topics.summary: The studio discusses the legal fallout of Senator Larry Craig’s arrest, the double standards in political accountability, and a guest's detailed account of clandestine sexual encounters in public restrooms.

topics.title: Bathroom Encounters and Pop Culture Debates
topics.summary: The studio explores various topics ranging from the logistics of public restroom encounters and political commentary to a debate over the merits of The Addams Family versus The Munsters.

topics.title: Pop Culture and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the differences between classic television shows like The Munsters and Addams Family, reviews of the Rob Zombie Halloween remake, Justin Timberlake's viral video, Owen Wilson's personal struggles, and the eccentric will of Leona Helmsley.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Political Updates
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including WWE steroid suspensions, celebrity news regarding Brad Pitt, Madonna, and Heath Ledger, as well as political updates on George W. Bush and Senator Larry Craig.
